Wh-What? You're just leaving it at {i}that{/i}!? H-How dare you, you {i}brute{/i}!
Well... {i}Fine{/i}! Be on your way! A-And don't expect me to miss you!

She glares grudgefully at your back as you walk off, but judging by the desire-laden expression that she still sports even as she fades away for good under the post-battle exhaustion that she cannot resist any longer, you're pretty sure that she didn't mean it, and that you can expect just as many elves as before in your future...
